title: moraea exaltata
intro: Moraea exaltata, also known as the yellow mountain iris, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Moraea exaltata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
